ellipse.style: fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 11.2973; stroke-miterlimit: 0; paint-order: markers fill stroke

text.style: font-size: 21.3333px; font-family: Arial; -inkscape-font-specification: Arial; text-align: center; text-anchor: middle; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 0; stroke-miterlimit: 0; stroke-dasharray: none; paint-order: markers fill stroke

tspan.style: font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-weight: bold; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 21.3333px; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; -inkscape-font-specification: 'Times New Roman, Bold'; opacity: 1; fill: currentColor; fill-opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; stroke-dasharray: none
